findings.summary: Release docs require a fresh ECC Tools billing/App/Marketplace check before launch copy can claim live billing readiness.
May 12 evidence proves package/plugin dry runs and clean install smoke, but it does not prove a live Marketplace billing state.
The reusable next action is a read-only evidence checklist that classifies each launch-copy billing claim before publication.

recommended_next_action.action: Run the promoted billing/Marketplace claim-verification checklist before any launch copy, GitHub release text, or social copy says billing is live.
